ddls:
CREATE TABLE "change_requests" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change request */,
  "change_number" TEXT /* Change number assigned to the request */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the schema */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the change request was submitted */,
  "schema_affected" TEXT /* Schema affected by the change */,
  "requested_action" TEXT /* Detailed description of the requested action */,
  "requested_by" TEXT /* Individual or group that requested the change */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference or meeting where the change was discussed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the change request (e.g., Done, In Progress, Pending) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes related to the change request */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the change request (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "estimated_completion_date" TEXT /* Estimated date by which the change should be completed */,
  "actual_completion_date" TEXT /* Actual date when the change was completed */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Approval status of the request (e.g., Approved, Rejected, Pending) */,
  "approval_by" TEXT /* User who approved or rejected the request */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date of approval or rejection */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the request */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_requests_approval_by FOREIGN KEY ("approval_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_requests_requested_by FOREIGN KEY ("requested_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_requests_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_requests_conference FOREIGN KEY ("conference") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_requests_schema_affected FOREIGN KEY ("schema_affected") REFERENCES schemas ("schema_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "schemas" (
  "schema_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schema */,
  "schema_name" TEXT /* Name of the schema */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the schema */,
  "current_version" TEXT /* Current version number of the schema */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the schema */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the schema was created */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the schema */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date of the last modification */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the schema (e.g., Active, Inactive, Archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schema_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conferences" (
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conference */,
  "conference_name" TEXT /* Name of the conference */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the conference */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the conference */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* Organizer of the conference */,
  "agenda" TEXT /* Brief description of the conference agenda */,
  "attendees" TEXT /* List of attendees of the conference */,
  "minutes" TEXT /* Minutes of the conference */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the conference details */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., State Education Session, Technical Staff, Regulatory Official) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or group the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the user details */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "change_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "change_id" INTEGER /* ID of the change request */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the change (e.g., Done, In Progress, Pending) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the log entry */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date of the last modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_logs_change_id FOREIGN KEY ("change_id") REFERENCES change_requests ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_logs_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_logs_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name")
)
